title: Roster lifecycle samples
description: Concrete narrative examples of TeamMember lifecycle transitions. Consumed by the SDUI documentation panel + test fixtures. Illustrates the state machine + the left_reason enum + the child-safety + capacity + eligibility observer paths.

transitions.injured_to_active: recovery — clears status but preserves audit trail
transitions.inactive_to_(new active row): member returns — new TeamMember row created; historic row preserved
transitions.graduated_to_(new active row): graduate returns as coach or staff — different member_type + role_on_team

state_machine.note: Historic terminal-state rows are NEVER hard-deleted (compliance material). Personal-erasure request redacts PII in place, preserves the structural fact.

samples.name: Academy junior — 3-year lifecycle
narrative: 2024-09-01 — Athlete Marco Rossi (age 11) trials for the U-13 squad. Trial converts.
2024-09-08 — TeamMember created (member_type='athlete', role_on_team='player', jersey=7, status='active').
2025-02-15 — Injured during match. TeamMemberInjured event fires. status='injured'.
2025-03-30 — Recovered. status='active'. TeamMemberStatusChanged event fires.
2025-08-31 — U-13 season ends. Wave 3 season sweep transitions Marco (now age 13) to inactive with left_reason='season_ended'. Historic row preserved.
2025-09-01 — New TeamMember row created on the U-14 squad. Different team_id, same member_id.
2026-08-31 — Marco (age 14) advances to U-15. Historic row preserved; new row on U-15.

samples.name: Gym class — recurring adult member
narrative: 2026-06-01 — User Sarah Chen (age 34) joins the Monday 7am Spin Class. TeamMember (member_type='user', role_on_team='player', status='active').
2026-08-20 — Sarah loses interest. TeamMember transitions to status='inactive' with left_reason='withdrew'. Historic row preserved.
2027-01-15 — Sarah returns. New TeamMember row created (same member_id, same team_id, different created_at). Historic 'inactive' row survives — participation lineage preserved.

samples.name: School cohort — graduation
narrative: 2026-09-01 — Student Amir Al-Sabah (age 17) enrolled in Grade 12. TeamMember (member_type='user', role_on_team='player', status='active').
2027-06-01 — Amir graduates. TeamMember transitions to status='graduated' with left_reason='graduated'. Historic row preserved as academic record — never hard-deleted.
Downstream: Wave 5 alumni module reads graduated TeamMember rows to build alumni-network directory.

samples.name: Capacity refusal → upsell
narrative: 2026-07-15 — Tenant (Medium tier) has a class with capacity=20, capacity_waitlist=0. Roster is at 20 active.
Admin attempts to add member #21. TeamMemberObserver runs CapacityGate::allowsAdditional — returns false.
Observer returns TEAM_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED (402) with upgrade CTA in meta.upgrade_url.
SDUI form displays the upgrade prompt. Analytics fires `Team Capacity Exceeded` event with tier + capacity — signals upsell impression.

samples.name: Age eligibility refusal
narrative: Team U-13 has min_age=11, max_age=13. Coach attempts to add Athlete Sofia (age 14).
AgeEligibilityGate::isEligible returns false (14 > max_age=13).
Observer returns TEAM_AGE_INELIGIBLE (422) with a clear message.
Coach sees the error inline on the roster-add form + suggests the U-14 squad instead (SDUI cross-suggestion widget).

samples.name: Cross-tenant polymorphic FK smuggling — defense-in-depth
narrative: Adversarial API call: POST /teams/{teamA in tenant Alpha}/members with body { member_type: 'user', member_id: 'usr_userB_in_tenant_Beta' }.
TeamMemberObserver resolves user_userB, checks user.tenant_id (Beta) against team.tenant_id (Alpha). Mismatch.
Observer returns TEAM_MEMBER_TENANT_MISMATCH (422). warn-severity audit row written (attempted breach).
Every occurrence is a signal for security review — should stay at 0 in normal operation.

samples.name: Coach change on minor-only team
narrative: Team U-13 (min_age=11, max_age=13). coach_id changed from Coach A → Coach B.
TeamCoachChanged event fires with is_minor_only=true.
Downstream: critical-severity audit row written (retention 7 years). Notifications dispatched to Coach A + Coach B + branch safeguarding lead (cannot-opt-out).
stackra.teams.coach_changed_total counter increments with label is_minor_only=true — dashboard alerts if the rate spikes.

samples.name: member_type='coach' blocked pre-Wave-2b
narrative: Wave 2 tenant attempts to add a member with member_type='coach'. Their tenant lacks team_polymorphic_coach entitlement.
TeamMemberObserver returns POLYMORPHIC_COACH_NOT_ENTITLED (402).

The tenant's workaround: add the coach as member_type='user' with role_on_team='coach'. Once Wave 2b staff module lands, the tenant's coaches migrate to member_type='coach' via a Wave 2b data-migration flow.
